detail: TAS-185A now records canonical_claim_route_id=`tassadar.article_route.direct_hull_cache_runtime.v1`, selected_decode_mode=`tassadar.decode.hull_cache.v1`, operator_verdict_green=true, public_posture=GreenBounded, public_verdict_green=true, route_minimality_audit_green=true, and article_equivalence_green=true.
